title: Glorious Golden Brazilian Chicken Stew
description: Rich and light Brazilian dish featuring Dutch stroop and glaze, cooked to perfection in a cataplana vessel, this stew is a midnight craving solution that is nut free friendly. It combines the flavors of chicken, stroop, and spices in a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the cataplana vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the Dutch stroop, chicken broth, thyme, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 25 minutes.
Stir in the glaze and continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
